work.title: Data & AI Engineer (Master Thesis)
work.location: BMW & DFKI (German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence) & Saarland University
work.description: Conducting a joint master thesis with **BMW**, **DFKI**, and **Saarland University** on evaluating multi-turn **Agentic RAG** systems through synthetic benchmark generation. Designed a scalable framework for failure localization in tool-using LLM agents and built a **LangGraph-based** pipeline to benchmark multi-turn reasoning and tool-calling trajectories. Developed an unsupervised auditing framework to assess enterprise RAG deployments across more than **4 million corporate records**.

work.title: AI Research Engineer (Working Student)
work.description: Industrialized enterprise AI systems spanning **KG-RAG**, **Agentic AI**, Digital Product Passports, and Industry 4.0 applications. Designed multi-agent workflows combining knowledge-graph traversal, tool calling, retrieval, and self-correction. Built pipelines for information extraction and ontology-based data mapping, an **MCP** assistant for live enterprise databases, and a **PyTorch** anomaly-detection system for distributed edge devices.

work.title: Big Data Platform Engineer II -- Approved for Senior
work.description: Engineered **CI/CD frameworks** and deployment tooling for distributed big data services on **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)**. Built automated testing and release-validation infrastructure to improve the reliability of large-scale cloud platform deployments.

work.title: Data Science & Analytics Intern
work.description: Developed an anomaly-detection model to identify vehicle battery depletion and replacement events from large-scale telemetry data. Engineered cloud-based **PySpark** services and data-quality solutions that increased calculated service-demand coverage by **62%** and supported vehicle recall investigations. Built **Streamlit** applications, NLP tools, and interactive dashboards for model tuning and operational analysis.

work.title: AI & DevOps Engineer
work.description: Managed distributed **DevOps infrastructure** and implemented automated monitoring, testing, and deployment workflows. Built a Dockerized API management platform with **Next.js**, integrating Stripe payments, authentication, and production service observability.

work.title: Production Engineering Fellow
work.description: Completed a fellowship at Facebook focused on **Linux administration**, site reliability engineering, DevOps, and infrastructure automation. Built and operated cloud services on **AWS EC2** using Docker and CI/CD, with monitoring and observability through **Prometheus** and **Grafana**.

work.title: Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer
work.description: Developed demand-forecasting models and automated data pipelines using **Python**, Prophet, SciPy, Flask, and SQL. Built an enterprise resource planning platform with **Angular** to manage inventory, logistics, human resources, and financial operations.

education.title: MSc. Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
education.description: Specializing in **Machine Learning**, natural language processing, computer vision, statistics, and AI systems. **Master thesis:** *Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems through Synthetic Benchmark Generation*, conducted in collaboration with **BMW** and **DFKI**. Received a grade of **1.0** for the preceding thesis seminar.

education.title: BSc. Computer Science
education.description: Graduated with a GPA of **94.6/100** and received a **60% merit-based scholarship**. Earned the Best Software Engineering GPA distinction five times. Focused on machine learning, time series, algorithms and optimization, cloud computing, distributed systems, computer vision, and software engineering.

education.title: DAAD Exchange Scholar - Computer Science
education.description: Received a full **DAAD KOSPIE scholarship** for an academic exchange year in Germany. Completed coursework in computer vision, autonomous driving, driver-assistance systems, human-vehicle interaction, web engineering, and statistical methods.

education.title: Associate of Science (A.S.) in Robotics and Automation Engineering
education.description: Completed technical training in industrial robotics, programmable logic controllers, control systems, digital electronics, sensors, and industrial automation. Developed an autonomous tennis-ball machine using PLC programming and PID-based speed and position control.
